# passage-cli v0.2.0

This release adds document deletion to the Passage CLI.

## Install

```sh
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/owainlewis/passage-cli/main/install.sh | bash
```

## Added

- Delete a document with `passage delete <doc>`.
- Use `passage delete --json <doc>` for stable script output.
- Receive clear API errors when a shared document must be unshared before deletion.
